'''magono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicknamee|nicknamee]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-g-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicknamee|nicknamee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| magono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mægeneth|mægeneth]] || [[word:mægenej|mægenej]] || [[word:mægenesh|mægenesh]] || [[word:mægene|mægene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:magogonoth|magogonoth]] || [[word:magogonoj|magogonoj]] || [[word:magogonosh|magogonosh]] || [[word:magogono|magogono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:magonoth|magonoth]] || [[word:magonoj|magonoj]] || [[word:magonosh|magonosh]] || [[word:magono|magono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:magofnoth|magofnoth]] || [[word:magofnoj|magofnoj]] || [[word:magofnosh|magofnosh]] || [[word:magofnof|magofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:magonotho|magonotho]] || [[word:magonojo|magonojo]] || [[word:magonosho|magonosho]] || [[word:magonoko|magonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:magonoth|magonoth]] || [[word:magonoj|magonoj]] || [[word:magonosh|magonosh]] || [[word:magono|magono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:magonothol|magonothol]] || [[word:magonojol|magonojol]] || [[word:magonoshol|magonoshol]] || [[word:magonokol|magonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:magonothotho|magonothotho]] || [[word:magonojojo|magonojojo]] || [[word:magonoshosho|magonoshosho]] || [[word:magonoko|magonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:magonothon|magonothon]] || [[word:magonojon|magonojon]] || [[word:magonoshon|magonoshon]] || [[word:magonokon|magonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:magonothoro|magonothoro]] || [[word:magonojoro|magonojoro]] || [[word:magonoshoro|magonoshoro]] || [[word:magonokoro|magonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
